news.title:
Cabinet approves SHP Development Scheme FY 2026-31 with ₹2,584.6 cr outlay, targeting 1,500 MW capacity and rural development.
Stocks like SJVN, Tata Power, NHPC, BHEL, and Triveni Turbine expected to benefit from SHP projects and indigenous manufacturing focus.
news.summary:
Cabinet approves SHP Development Scheme FY 2026-31 with ₹2,584.6 cr outlay, targeting 1,500 MW capacity and rural development.
Stocks like SJVN, Tata Power, NHPC, BHEL, and Triveni Turbine expected to benefit from SHP projects and indigenous manufacturing focus.

news.title:
SJVN's 1000 MW Bikaner Solar Project generated 1 billion units as of March 2026.
Project's tariff is ₹2.57/unit, expected annual generation is 2454.55 MU, reducing 2.78M tonnes CO2 over 25 years.
news.summary:
SJVN's 1000 MW Bikaner Solar Project generated 1 billion units as of March 2026.
Project's tariff is ₹2.57/unit, expected annual generation is 2454.55 MU, reducing 2.78M tonnes CO2 over 25 years.

news.title:
Parthajit De appointed Director (Finance) of SJVN for 5 years from March 19, 2026.
Sipan Kumar Garg ceases additional charge as Director (Finance) and CFO of SJVN.
news.summary:
Parthajit De appointed Director (Finance) of SJVN for 5 years from March 19, 2026.
Sipan Kumar Garg ceases additional charge as Director (Finance) and CFO of SJVN.

news.title:
SJVN's Nathpa Jhakri Hydro Power Station achieves 150 billion units of power generation.
It is India's largest underground hydropower station, aiding clean energy and emissions reduction.
news.summary:
SJVN's Nathpa Jhakri Hydro Power Station achieves 150 billion units of power generation.
It is India's largest underground hydropower station, aiding clean energy and emissions reduction.

news.title: SJVN approves a dividend of Rs 1.15 per share for shareholders.
news.summary: SJVN approves a dividend of Rs 1.15 per share for shareholders.

news.title:
SJVN's board approves fund-raising plan up to ₹1000 crore for growth.
The funds aim to support SJVN's various growth initiatives and projects.
news.summary:
SJVN's board approves fund-raising plan up to ₹1000 crore for growth.
The funds aim to support SJVN's various growth initiatives and projects.

news.title:
SJVN reports Q3 consolidated net profit of ₹2.2B, up from ₹1.49B YoY.
This marks significant growth in the company's quarterly profit performance.
news.summary:
SJVN reports Q3 consolidated net profit of ₹2.2B, up from ₹1.49B YoY.
This marks significant growth in the company's quarterly profit performance.

news.title:
SJVN's Rampur Hydro Power Station generated 2,000 MUs fastest ever on Feb 5, 2026.
The 412 MW plant achieved this 9 days earlier than the 2020 record.
news.summary:
SJVN's Rampur Hydro Power Station generated 2,000 MUs fastest ever on Feb 5, 2026.
The 412 MW plant achieved this 9 days earlier than the 2020 record.

news.title:
SJVN's 70 MW Dhubri Solar Project in Assam starts operations with a cost of Rs. 367.4 crore.
The project spans 330 acres, will generate 141.1 million units in year one, and supply power to Assam Power Distribution Company.
news.summary:
SJVN's 70 MW Dhubri Solar Project in Assam starts operations with a cost of Rs. 367.4 crore.
The project spans 330 acres, will generate 141.1 million units in year one, and supply power to Assam Power Distribution Company.

news.title:
SJVN schedules a board meeting on Feb 11, 2026, to discuss fundraising.
The fundraising will be via non-convertible debentures.
news.summary:
SJVN schedules a board meeting on Feb 11, 2026, to discuss fundraising.
The fundraising will be via non-convertible debentures.

news.title:
Govt plans 19% rise in power PSUs' investments to Rs 1.01 lakh cr for FY27.
Key firms like NTPC, Power Grid, and NHPC see increased investment allocations.
news.summary:
Govt plans 19% rise in power PSUs' investments to Rs 1.01 lakh cr for FY27.
Key firms like NTPC, Power Grid, and NHPC see increased investment allocations.

news.title:
SJVN Ltd's Board to meet on Feb 11, 2026, to review Q3 FY26 financial results and consider an interim dividend.
Trading window remains closed from Jan 1, 2026, to Feb 13, 2026, post financial results declaration.
news.summary:
SJVN Ltd's Board to meet on Feb 11, 2026, to review Q3 FY26 financial results and consider an interim dividend.
Trading window remains closed from Jan 1, 2026, to Feb 13, 2026, post financial results declaration.

news.title:
Avaada is in advanced talks with banks to raise $700M for SJVN's solar-wind project.
The 20-year deal involves foreign banks like Standard Chartered and SMBC.
news.summary:
Avaada is in advanced talks with banks to raise $700M for SJVN's solar-wind project.
The 20-year deal involves foreign banks like Standard Chartered and SMBC.

news.title:
SJVN's 70 MW Dhubri Solar Project inaugurated by Assam CM, spanning 330 acres.
The project costs Rs.367.4 crore, generating 141.1M units annually; first large-scale solar in NE.
news.summary:
SJVN's 70 MW Dhubri Solar Project inaugurated by Assam CM, spanning 330 acres.
The project costs Rs.367.4 crore, generating 141.1M units annually; first large-scale solar in NE.

news.title:
FIIs raised stakes in Canara Bank, J&K Bank, Torrent Pharma, and SJVN in Q3FY26, reflecting confidence in long-term growth and asset quality improvement.
Canara Bank saw the highest FII increase of 2.7%, while SJVN had the lowest at 0.1%. FIIs' decisions influence market liquidity and sentiment.
news.summary:
FIIs raised stakes in Canara Bank, J&K Bank, Torrent Pharma, and SJVN in Q3FY26, reflecting confidence in long-term growth and asset quality improvement.
Canara Bank saw the highest FII increase of 2.7%, while SJVN had the lowest at 0.1%. FIIs' decisions influence market liquidity and sentiment.

news.title:
8.2 Cr shares of SJVN were traded on Friday.
Silver Touch Technologies marked its 5th consecutive day of gains.
news.summary:
8.2 Cr shares of SJVN were traded on Friday.
Silver Touch Technologies marked its 5th consecutive day of gains.

news.title: Tata Power Renewable Energy commissions a 1 GW DCR-compliant solar power project for SJVN.
news.summary: Tata Power Renewable Energy commissions a 1 GW DCR-compliant solar power project for SJVN.

news.title:
SJVN's subsidiary launched 1,000 MW Bikaner Solar Power Project in Rajasthan.
The project costs ₹5,492 crore, spans 5,000 acres, and reduces 2.78M tonnes carbon emissions.
news.summary:
SJVN's subsidiary launched 1,000 MW Bikaner Solar Power Project in Rajasthan.
The project costs ₹5,492 crore, spans 5,000 acres, and reduces 2.78M tonnes carbon emissions.

news.title:
SJVN Ltd fined Rs. 542,800 for non-compliance with SEBI Listing Regulations.
Penalties due to delays in board composition; govt to appoint directors soon.
news.summary:
SJVN Ltd fined Rs. 542,800 for non-compliance with SEBI Listing Regulations.
Penalties due to delays in board composition; govt to appoint directors soon.

news.title:
NLC India Renewables signs a long-term PPA with SJVN Ltd for a 200 MW wind project.
SJVN Ltd is a Navaratna PSU under the Ministry of Power.
news.summary:
NLC India Renewables signs a long-term PPA with SJVN Ltd for a 200 MW wind project.
SJVN Ltd is a Navaratna PSU under the Ministry of Power.
